title: Copy/Transfer monday Workdocs Between Items and Boards
excerpt: Automation: When setting up the automation “When Status changes, create item in another Board”, monday workDocs aren’t available. It would be beneficial to have an option to transfer or copy these docs to the new item on…

posts.author: gustA (Gusta)
posts.cookedHtml:
Automation: When setting up the automation “When Status changes, create item in another Board”, monday workDocs aren’t available. It would be beneficial to have an option to transfer or copy these docs to the new item on another board.

API: A function to copy or transfer monday workDocs between items via API would expand integration and custom automation possibilities.

The ability to transfer or copy them is essential to maintain information continuity and work efficiency, especially when items are moved between boards or duplicated. In many work scenarios, the information in a doc is as vital as the item itself, and the need to manually copy or recreate a doc can be time-consuming and error-prone.

posts.author: Matias.Monday (Matias)
posts.cookedHtml:
Hello @gustA,

Thank you for the feedback!

I have created a request for this

Cheers,
Matias

posts.author: Matias.Monday (Matias)
posts.cookedHtml: Request: monday.com: Where Teams Get Work Done

posts.author: gustA (Gusta)
posts.cookedHtml: Amazing Matias, Thank you so much for the reply

posts.author: Matias.Monday (Matias)
posts.cookedHtml: Happy to help @gustA
